mapper.select: SELECT id, name, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, late_threshold, early_threshold, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_rules WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY is_default DESC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, late_threshold, early_threshold, is_default, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_rules WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_rules SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
